content: We can reframe the comparative evaluation of curiosity-driven RL methods (ICM vs RND vs intrinsic curiosity agents) as a curious agent probing its own memory of method performance to actively discover unreported performance edge cases rather than just running fixed benchmark tests. This turns the comparative analysis task itself into an instance of the curious agent behavior being studied.
source_topics: curiosity driven reinforcement learning ICM RND compared to curious agent
trigger_topic: curiosity driven reinforcement learning ICM RND compared to curious agent
